trigger: When preventing unsupported opencode coverage from being reported as complete

native_entry.projection_rule: Use only as a pointer to skills/software-project-governance/SKILL.md; do not duplicate workflow rules.

target_cwd_e2e.evidence: Executed from project/e2e-test-project cwd and returned Test Project status with default-confirm permission mode.

agent_runtime_e2e.command: opencode run --dir . --format json "Read .governance/plan-tracker.md in the current working directory and answer exactly: E2E_STAGE=<current stage text>. Do not modify files."
agent_runtime_e2e.blocked_reason: opencode runtime is installed, but provider configuration sent an invalid model name to DeepSeek and returned HTTP 400 before task execution.
agent_runtime_e2e.evidence: Command returned APIError: supported model names are deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash, but configured request passed deepseek-v4-pro with a stray formatting suffix.
